# Vendored browser dependencies

These files are pinned and served from the same origin as the application:

- `supabase-2.108.2.js`: `@supabase/supabase-js` 2.108.2 UMD bundle.
- `chart-4.5.1.min.js`: Chart.js 4.5.1 UMD bundle.

Source packages were downloaded from the official npm registry. Keep the
matching license files when updating either dependency.
